svg.aria-label: How Orient works, in three systems: the orchestration, where you and the orchestrator reach a North Star and delegate the build to fresh Execute and Critique agents that end at your approval; the skills library the agents draw from; and the self-improving foundation, which watches the whole orchestration, sharpens the skills, and files pages into a brain you own.
svg.text: a shelf of skills the agents draw from
tests every change, keeps what wins
